---
title: "Natalie Smith"
image: headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 30em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/natsmith/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/plantsmith
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:nasmith@bren.ucsb.edu
---

## About me

Hi, I'm Natalie. I'm fascinated by the intersection of the natural and built environment. I am currently pursuing a master's degree at the Bren School of Environmental Science & Management (UCSB), where I'm focusing on sustainable landscapes and addressing climate challenges through strategic planning and data-driven approaches.

## Professional Interests

Climate Adaptation \| Conservation Planning \| Data Science \| Biodiversity \| Resilient Landscapes \| Built Ecology \| Connectivity

## Skillsets

Data Science \| ArcGIS \| R \| Climate Adaptation \| Conservation Planning \| Plant Identification \| Horticulture \| Project Management

## Current Projects

Mapping Connectivity in the Central Coast Region, Coming Soon

[Mapping Heat-Risk Inequalities in Los Angeles County](https://plantsmith.shinyapps.io/heat_risk_inequality/)
